'''dowalaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:rubeoloid|rubeoloid]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-w-l
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:rubeoloid|rubeoloid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dowalaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowalithi|dowalithi]] || [[word:dowaliji|dowaliji]] || [[word:dowalishi|dowalishi]] || [[word:dowaliki|dowaliki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowaluthuthu|dowaluthuthu]] || [[word:dowalujuju|dowalujuju]] || [[word:dowalushushu|dowalushushu]] || [[word:dowalukuku|dowalukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowaluthu|dowaluthu]] || [[word:dowaluju|dowaluju]] || [[word:dowalushu|dowalushu]] || [[word:dowaluku|dowaluku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowalufthuf|dowalufthuf]] || [[word:dowalufjuf|dowalufjuf]] || [[word:dowalufshuf|dowalufshuf]] || [[word:dowalufkuf|dowalufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowalethe|dowalethe]] || [[word:dowaleje|dowaleje]] || [[word:dowaleshe|dowaleshe]] || [[word:dowaleke|dowaleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowalothotho|dowalothotho]] || [[word:dowalojojo|dowalojojo]] || [[word:dowaloshosho|dowaloshosho]] || [[word:dowalokoko|dowalokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowalotho|dowalotho]] || [[word:dowalojo|dowalojo]] || [[word:dowalosho|dowalosho]] || [[word:dowaloko|dowaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowalofthof|dowalofthof]] || [[word:dowalofjof|dowalofjof]] || [[word:dowalofshof|dowalofshof]] || [[word:dowalofkof|dowalofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfthÃŸf|dowalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfjÃŸf|dowalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfshÃŸf|dowalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfkÃŸf|dowalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|dowalÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|dowalÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|dowalÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|dowalÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfthÃŸf|dowalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfjÃŸf|dowalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfshÃŸf|dowalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfkÃŸf|dowalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfthÃŸf|dowalÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfjÃŸf|dowalÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfshÃŸf|dowalÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:dowalÃŸfkÃŸf|dowalÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dowalÃḊthÃḊ|dowalÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:dowalÃḊjÃḊ|dowalÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:dowalÃḊshÃḊ|dowalÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:dowalÃḊkÃḊ|dowalÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dowalathatha|dowalathatha]] || [[word:dowalajaja|dowalajaja]] || [[word:dowalashasha|dowalashasha]] || [[word:dowalakaka|dowalakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dowalatha|dowalatha]] || [[word:dowalaja|dowalaja]] || [[word:dowalasha|dowalasha]] || [[word:dowalaka|dowalaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dowalafthaf|dowalafthaf]] || [[word:dowalafjaf|dowalafjaf]] || [[word:dowalafshaf|dowalafshaf]] || [[word:dowalafkaf|dowalafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:dowalasha|dowalasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowalshÃḋsha|dowalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowalrosha|dowalrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowalmusha|dowalmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowalyasha|dowalyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowalnkshÃḋsha|godowalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowalnkrosha|godowalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowalnkmusha|godowalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowalnkyasha|godowalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:dowawalasha|dowawalasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowawalshÃḋsha|dowawalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowawalrosha|dowawalrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowawalmusha|dowawalmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowawalyasha|dowawalyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowawalnkshÃḋsha|godowawalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowawalnkrosha|godowawalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowawalnkmusha|godowawalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowawalnkyasha|godowawalnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:dewÃḊlasha|dewÃḊlasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dewÃḊlshÃḋsha|dewÃḊlshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dewÃḊlrosha|dewÃḊlrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dewÃḊlmusha|dewÃḊlmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dewÃḊlyasha|dewÃḊlyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godewÃḊlnkshÃḋsha|godewÃḊlnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godewÃḊlnkrosha|godewÃḊlnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godewÃḊlnkmusha|godewÃḊlnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godewÃḊlnkyasha|godewÃḊlnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:dowfalasha|dowfalasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:dowfalshÃḋsha|dowfalshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dowfalrosha|dowfalrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dowfalmusha|dowfalmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dowfalyasha|dowfalyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godowfalnkshÃḋsha|godowfalnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godowfalnkrosha|godowfalnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godowfalnkmusha|godowfalnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godowfalnkyasha|godowfalnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
